#  View the Change History of a Change Event 
##  Background 
If you need to view the change history of a change event, you can do so when viewing that change event.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Change Events tool.  
OR
    * ‘Read Only’ or ‘Standard’ level permissions on the project’s Change Events tool AND the ‘View the Change History of a Change Event’ granular permission.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Change Events](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-change-events)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool.
  2. Open the change event that you want to view the change history on.
  3. Click the **Change History** tab.
  4. Review the following columns for each row:
     * Date
     * Action By
     * Changed
     * From
     * To  
![Change Events Web View Change History Sui](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/40cb8414d441a4c7af5190f25e4093fb/2d7d88cd76fa2729f9545daa61d04ca0/change_events_web_view-change-history_sui.png?fm=webp&h=328)


## See Also
  * [View Change Events](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/view-change-events)
  * [View the Change Events Line Items View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/view-the-change-events-line-items-view)
  * [How are financial line items and budget codes updated across change objects?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-are-financial-line-items-and-budget-codes-updated-across-change-objects)


**Date.** The date and time the change was made.
**Action By.** The user who performed the change.
**Changed.** Details the change that was made.
**From.** Displays the original value or selection prior to the action.  
_Note:_ -- indicates a blank field.
**To.** Displays the new value entered or selection made.
title: View the Change History of a Change Event
